sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(7) — Arroyo Grande Creek (San Luis Obispo Co.)
USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 269586, "Arroyo Grande Creek", Stream, San Luis Obispo Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":269586,"gaz_name":"Arroyo Grande Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"San Luis Obispo"} — geometry multipoint; first point (Web Mercator -13428583.4381, 4177589.8073) converts to lon -120.631017, lat 35.100814, at the creek's mouth near Oceano/Pismo Beach, replacing the file's previous coordinate (-120.5900, 35.1300), which was off by ~4.9 km.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Closed to all fishing all year, from the mouth to Lopez Canyon Dam. Arroyo Grande Creek supports federally threatened South-Central California Coast steelhead; Lopez Dam blocks upstream migration to most historical spawning habitat.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year, from the mouth to Lopez Canyon Dam
regulations.verbatimText: Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
